title: OIDC Settings
description: Configure OpenID Connect (OIDC) for single sign-on with external identity providers like Authentik, Authelia, or Pocket ID.

methods.sectionDesc: Choose which login methods are available for users to sign in.

internal.label: Local Login
internal.description: Built-in username and password authentication. Always available for admins. Can be hidden for other users via OIDC-Only Mode.

oidc.label: OIDC Login
oidc.description: OpenID Connect for single sign-on with external providers (Authentik, Keycloak, etc.).

providerConfig.sectionDesc: Configure your OIDC provider settings. All fields are required to enable OIDC.
providerConfig.clientSecretHint: Required for confidential clients. Leave empty for public clients using PKCE only.
providerConfig.scopeHint: Scopes sent in the OIDC authorization request. Leave empty to use the default.
providerConfig.claimDesc: Map OIDC token claims to Grimmory user fields. These must match your provider's token claims.
providerConfig.sessionDurationHint: How long OIDC users stay logged in. Leave empty to use system default.
providerConfig.backchannelLogoutHint: Configure this URI in your OIDC provider to enable server-initiated session revocation.

provisioning.sectionDesc: Configure how new OIDC users are created and what permissions they receive.
provisioning.autoDesc: When enabled, new users are automatically created on first OIDC login with the permissions below. When disabled, users must be manually created in Grimmory before they can log in via OIDC.
provisioning.linkLocalDesc: When enabled, existing locally-created users will be automatically linked to their OIDC identity on first OIDC login if the usernames match. When disabled, only users originally created via OIDC can be matched by username.
provisioning.linkLocalWarning: Consider disabling this after all existing users have logged in via OIDC at least once. Leaving it on allows anyone with a matching username in your OIDC provider to take over a local account.
provisioning.selectLibraries: Select libraries new users can access

groupMapping.sectionDesc: Map OIDC provider groups to Grimmory permissions and library access. Users' permissions are synced based on their group memberships.
groupMapping.syncModeHint: Controls how OIDC groups are synced to user permissions on login.

infoPanel.sectionDesc: Use these values when configuring your OIDC provider's client settings.

oidcOnly.sectionDesc: When enabled, local login is hidden and users are automatically redirected to the OIDC provider. Admins can still access local login via /login?local=true.
oidcOnly.label: OIDC-Only Mode
oidcOnly.description: Disable local login for all users and redirect to OIDC automatically. Admin users can still log in locally using the backdoor URL.
oidcOnly.backdoorHint: Admin backdoor: access /login?local=true to use local login.

toast.providerError: Failed to save OIDC provider settings.
toast.provisionError: Failed to save OIDC auto-provisioning settings.
toast.syncModeError: Failed to save group sync mode.
